description: A modern, secure, and user-friendly login page for a SaaS application.
user_stories: As a user, I want to enter my email and password to log in.
As a user, I want to see an option to keep me logged in.
As a user, I want a way to recover my password if I forget it.
As a user, I want to see clear feedback if my login fails.
non_functional_requirements: Must be fully responsive on devices from 320px to 1920px width.
Must comply with WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility standards.
The page should load in under 2 seconds on a standard 4G connection.
